description: Style Note Do you like leggings because they're comfy? Then you'll love these leggings from aneri! They're soft and Fit like a cosy glove in winter. We at myntra can't get enough of these bright colour pop pieces. Grab a couple of these and colour block or mix 'n match your latest kurtas. Product Details Ink blue leggings with an elasticated waist, drawstrings ont he inner and tapering hems that gather around your ankle. Material and Care Blended cotton fabric Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Model Statistics The model (height 5'8" and waist 28")  is wearing a size M
